<template>
  <div :data-block-uid="blockId" class="search-block">
    <input type="search" placeholder="Search..." v-model="query" />

    <div v-if="visibleFacets.length" class="facets">

ref-search-desc.plaintext: The following examples show how to render a Search block on your own frontend. Use the schema to register the block, the JSON as a reference for the data structure, and the React or Vue snippets as a starting point for your component.

children.text: The following examples show how to render a Search block on your own frontend. Use the schema to register the block, the JSON as a reference for the data structure, and the React or Vue snippets as a starting point for your component.

description: The search block allows the content of the website to be listed. Users can use so-called facets to select certain properties of the listed content in order to filter them (e.g. filtering the news of 2022).
title: Search
